message.content: @startuml title Login Sequence GET actor customer participant "Tomcat" as Tomcat #lightgray box entries (UI) #LightGray participant Index participant BaseServlet participant index.jsp participant Login participant login.jsp end box customer -> Tomcat : 1 GET / activate Tomcat Tomcat -> Index : 2 doGet() Index --> BaseServlet : BaseServlet -> index.jsp : 3 render() index.jsp --> BaseServlet : BaseServlet -> index.jsp : 4 forward() index.jsp -> Login : 5 doGet() Login --> index.jsp : index.jsp <-- BaseServlet : 6 render() BaseServlet -> login.jsp : 7 forward() login.jsp ..> customer : 8 result deactivate Tomcat @enduml
